title: Release Record
description: Schema for individual release record documents (docs/releases/RELEASE-x.y.z-YYYYMMDD.md). These are markdown files with YAML frontmatter between '---' markers.

provider.description: Provider name matching config/approved_providers.json provider_name field

model.description: Model name matching the model's value for the provider

tier.description: Provider tier at time of release

gov_signals_file.description: Path to governance_signals.json capturing benchmark evidence for this release

gates_completed.description: List of gate identifiers completed e.g. ['Gate 1', 'Gate 2']

rollback_notes.description: How to roll back to the previous release
